name: ClawMem
description: Mirror OpenClaw sessions into GitHub-compatible issues and comments.

baseUrl.label: API Base URL
baseUrl.help: GitHub-compatible API base URL. Root URLs are normalized to /api/v3 automatically.

repo.label: Repository
repo.help: Legacy single-route setting. New installs should use per-agent routes under agents.<agentId>.

token.label: API Token
token.help: Legacy single-route setting. New installs should use per-agent routes under agents.<agentId>.

authScheme.label: Auth Scheme
authScheme.help: Default auth scheme for per-agent routes. Automatically provisioned credentials use 'token'.

agents.label: Agent Routes
agents.help: Per-agent ClawMem credentials keyed by agent id. Missing repo/token are provisioned automatically on first use.

defaultLabels.label: Default Labels
defaultLabels.help: Labels added to every new session issue. Good place for topic:* tags.

memoryTitlePrefix.label: Memory Title Prefix
memoryTitlePrefix.help: Prefix used when creating memory issue titles.

agentLabelPrefix.label: Agent Label Prefix
agentLabelPrefix.help: Dynamic agent label prefix, for example agent:coder.

turnCommentDelayMs.label: Turn Sync Delay (ms)
turnCommentDelayMs.help: Small delay so transcript writes settle before a turn comment is mirrored.

summaryWaitTimeoutMs.label: Summary Wait Timeout (ms)
summaryWaitTimeoutMs.help: How long clawmem waits for the OpenClaw subagent summarizer before writing a failed summary.

memoryRecallLimit.label: Memory Recall Limit
memoryRecallLimit.help: Maximum number of active memories injected into context before an agent starts.

maxExcerptChars.label: Max Excerpt Chars
maxExcerptChars.help: Soft cap used when rendering summaries and comment sections.
